name: search_pdf
description: Search through a PDF document (Back to the Future movie script) to find relevant sections that answer a question. Provide a question or keywords and the tool will return the most relevant excerpts from the script.

question.description: The question or keywords to search for in the PDF script. For example: 'What does Doc say about the flux capacitor?' or 'DeLorean time travel scene'

max_results.description: Maximum number of relevant text sections to return (default: 5)
